topic: surface area comparison of triangular pyramids
latex: You are painting sets of trees for a model of your town. Each tree is shaped like a triangular pyramid. The triangular faces of the first tree you paint have bases of 6 millimeters and heights of 13 millimeters, and the triangular faces of the second tree you paint have bases of 7 millimeters and heights of 12 millimeters. If you do not paint the base of either tree, which tree uses more paint? How much more?
